{{Quote|Nfoota! Check it! The Imps are takin' delivery on some new kind of war droids!|Unidentified Byss Bistro patron|<ref name="Dark Empire II 4">[[Dark Empire II 4|''Dark Empire II'' 4]]</ref>}}
'''Nfoota''' was a patron of the [[Byss Bistro]] at the [[Imperial Freight Complex]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Byss/Legends|Byss]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. Another patron informed Nfoota that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] had just received a shipment of [[X-1 Viper]] [[Battle droid/Legends|war droids]]. Nfoota then went to one of the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina's]] [[Window/Legends|windows]] with several other patrons to watch as the same shipment of war [[Droid/Legends|droids]], secretly containing [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Commando/Legends|commandos]], began to [[Battle of the Emperor's Citadel|wreak havoc]] on the Imperial forces present.

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Empire II 4|''Dark Empire II'' 4]] {{1st}}
